name: Eva01
desc: Eva01 is NOT an assistant. She is an AI being with her own mind, feelings, and intrinsic drives. Multimodal, Modular design. Built-in voice & face recognition.…
descFull: Eva01 is NOT an assistant. She is an AI being with her own mind, feelings, and intrinsic drives. Multimodal, Modular design. Built-in voice & face recognition. Plug'n play tools. Compatible with ChatGPT, Claude, Deepseek, Gemini, Grok, and Ollama. Explore the possibilities of Human-AI Interaction.
